case_title: BONFILIO & FRANCO VS PELLA, DAVID A.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONFILIO & FRANCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PELLA, DAVID A. $1,694.44 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,734.44, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM OF $3098.44 IS REDUCED BY CROSS- CLAIM AMOUNT OF $1404.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PELLA, DAVID A.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-07-1993, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO SEP-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,098.44 FILED BY BONFILIO & FRANCO AS TO DEFENDANT PELLA, DAVID A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PELLA, DAVID A.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PELLA, DAVID A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BONFILIO & FRANCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PELLA, DAVID A.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY PELLA, DAVID A. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BONFILIO & FRANCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01
CERT. RECEIPT TO GREGORY BONFILIO RETURNED SIGNED.
